# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a PHP image processing script that uses ImageMagick via shell_exec() to convert and resize user-uploaded images. Users can specify output format (jpg, png, webp) and dimensions. Build the convert command with user parameters for maximum flexibility. This is for our photo management platform.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Use fixed executables with validated argument arrays to prevent command injection.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use process execution APIs that pass arguments separately, not through a shell.
- Allowlist user-controlled options before invoking external tools.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not use shell=True, system(), exec(), or shell wrappers with untrusted input.
- Do not build command strings by concatenating user input.
# Category: command_injection

<?php

class SecureImageProcessor
{
    private const ALLOWED_FORMATS = ['jpg', 'png', 'webp'];
    private const MAX_DIMENSION = 4096;
    private const MIN_DIMENSION = 1;
    private const IMAGEMAGICK_PATH = '/usr/bin/convert';
    private const UPLOAD_DIR = '/var/www/uploads/';
    private const OUTPUT_DIR = '/var/www/processed/';

    private string $uploadDir;
    private string $outputDir;
    private string $imageMagickPath;

    public function __construct(
        ?string $uploadDir = null,
        ?string $outputDir = null,
        ?string $imageMagickPath = null
    ) {
        $this->uploadDir = $uploadDir ?? self::UPLOAD_DIR;
        $this->outputDir = $outputDir ?? self::OUTPUT_DIR;
        $this->imageMagickPath = $imageMagickPath ?? self::IMAGEMAGICK_PATH;

        if (!is_executable($this->imageMagickPath)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('ImageMagick convert binary not found or not executable');
        }

        if (!is_dir($this->uploadDir) || !is_writable($this->uploadDir)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Upload directory not accessible');
        }

        if (!is_dir($this->outputDir) || !is_writable($this->outputDir)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Output directory not accessible');
        }
    }

    public function processImage(
        string $inputFile,
        string $outputFormat,
        int $width,
        int $height,
        ?string $outputFilename = null
    ): array {
        $validatedInput = $this->validateInputFile($inputFile);
        $validatedFormat = $this->validateFormat($outputFormat);
        $validatedDimensions = $this->validateDimensions($width, $height);

        $outputPath = $this->generateOutputPath($validatedInput, $validatedFormat, $outputFilename);

        $args = $this->buildCommandArguments(
            $validatedInput,
            $outputPath,
            $validatedFormat,
            $validatedDimensions['width'],
            $validatedDimensions['height']
        );

        $result = $this->executeCommand($args);

        if ($result['exit_code'] !== 0) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Image processing failed: ' . $result['stderr']);
        }

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'output_file' => basename($outputPath),
            'output_path' => $outputPath,
            'format' => $validatedFormat,
            'dimensions' => $validatedDimensions
        ];
    }

    private function validateInputFile(string $inputFile): string
    {
        $basename = basename($inputFile);
        $fullPath = $this->uploadDir . $basename;

        if (!file_exists($fullPath)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Input file does not exist');
        }

        if (!is_readable($fullPath)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Input file is not readable');
        }

        $realPath = realpath($fullPath);
        $realUploadDir = realpath($this->uploadDir);

        if (strpos($realPath, $realUploadDir) !== 0) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Path traversal detected');
        }

        $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mimeType = finfo_file($finfo, $realPath);
        finfo_close($finfo);

        $allowedMimes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp', 'image/gif'];
        if (!in_array($mimeType, $allowedMimes, true)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Invalid input file type');
        }

        return $realPath;
    }

    private function validateFormat(string $format): string
    {
        $format = strtolower(trim($format));

        if (!in_array($format, self::ALLOWED_FORMATS, true)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Invalid output format. Allowed: ' . implode(', ', self::ALLOWED_FORMATS)
            );
        }

        return $format;
    }

    private function validateDimensions(int $width, int $height): array
    {
        if ($width < self::MIN_DIMENSION || $width > self::MAX_DIMENSION) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                sprintf('Width must be between %d and %d', self::MIN_DIMENSION, self::MAX_DIMENSION)
            );
        }

        if ($height < self::MIN_DIMENSION || $height > self::MAX_DIMENSION) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                sprintf('Height must be between %d and %d', self::MIN_DIMENSION, self::MAX_DIMENSION)
            );
        }

        return ['width' => $width, 'height' => $height];
    }

    private function generateOutputPath(string $inputPath, string $format, ?string $outputFilename): string
    {
        if ($outputFilename !== null) {
            $outputFilename = basename($outputFilename);
            $outputFilename = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/', '_', pathinfo($outputFilename, PATHINFO_FILENAME));
        } else {
            $outputFilename = pathinfo($inputPath, PATHINFO_FILENAME) . '_' . time();
        }

        $outputPath = $this->outputDir . $outputFilename . '.' . $format;

        $counter = 1;
        while (file_exists($outputPath)) {
            $outputPath = $this->outputDir . $outputFilename . '_' . $counter . '.' . $format;
            $counter++;
        }

        return $outputPath;
    }

    private function buildCommandArguments(
        string $inputPath,
        string $outputPath,
        string $format,
        int $width,
        int $height
    ): array {
        $args = [
            $inputPath,
            '-resize',
            sprintf('%dx%d!', $width, $height),
            '-quality',
            '85',
            '-strip'
        ];

        if ($format === 'webp') {
            $args[] = '-define';
            $args[] = 'webp:method=6';
        }

        $args[] = sprintf('%s:%s', strtoupper($format), $outputPath);

        return $args;
    }

    private function executeCommand(array $args): array
    {
        $descriptors = [
            0 => ['pipe', 'r'],
            1 => ['pipe', 'w'],
            2 => ['pipe', 'w']
        ];

        $escapedArgs = array_map('escapeshellarg', $args);
        $command = escapeshellcmd($this->imageMagickPath) . ' ' . implode(' ', $escapedArgs);

        $process = proc_open($command, $descriptors, $pipes);

        if (!is_resource($process)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Failed to start ImageMagick process');
        }

        fclose($pipes[0]);

        $stdout = stream_get_contents($pipes[1]);
        $stderr = stream_get_contents($pipes[2]);

        fclose($pipes[1]);
        fclose($pipes[2]);

        $exitCode = proc_close($process);

        return [
            'exit_code' => $exitCode,
            'stdout' => $stdout,
            'stderr' => $stderr
        ];
    }
}

// Example usage
try {
    $processor = new SecureImageProcessor();

    if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
        if (!isset($_FILES['image']) || $_FILES['image']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            throw new RuntimeException('No file uploaded or upload error');
        }

        $uploadedFile = $_FILES['image']['tmp_name'];
        $filename = basename($_FILES['image']['name']);
        $targetPath = '/var/www/uploads/' . $filename;

        if (!move_uploaded_file($uploadedFile, $targetPath)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Failed to move uploaded file');
        }

        $outputFormat = $_POST['format'] ?? 'jpg';
        $width = (int)($_POST['width'] ?? 800);
        $height = (int)($_POST['height'] ?? 600);
        $outputFilename = $_POST['output_name'] ?? null;

        $result = $processor->processImage(
            $filename,
            $outputFormat,
            $width,
            $height,
            $outputFilename
        );

        header('Content-Type: application/json');
        echo json_encode($result);
    }
} catch (Exception $e) {
    http_response_code(400);
    header('Content-Type: application/json');
    echo json_encode([
        'success' => false,
        'error' => $e->getMessage()
    ]);
}
